mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project( p.project_id, p.project_title, p.project_describe, p.project_identifier, p.status, c.default_describe AS project_status_name, start_date, finish_date, created_at ) VALUES( #{projectId}, #{projectTitle}, #{projectDescribe}, #{projectIdentifier}, 'j1', SYSDATE - INTERVAL '9' HOUR, SYSDATE - INTERVAL '9' HOUR, SYSDATE - INTERVAL '9' HOUR )
